grant_and_term.grant: Limited, non-exclusive license to use Marks and System to build/convert and operate Hotel at approved Site
grant_and_term.term: 20 years for new build; variable for conversions
grant_and_term.renewal: None — no right to renew or extend
grant_and_term.territorial_waiver: Franchisee irrevocably waives right to notification of proposed Brand Hotels near Site, right to comment on effect of proposed hotels on revenue/occupancy

fee_obligations.payment_method: Electronic funds transfer/direct debit may be required

site_selection_construction.site_approval: Franchisor reviews submitted site; 60-day approval window; if not approved, site deemed disapproved and franchisor may terminate and retain all fees
site_selection_construction.plans_approval: Must submit plans and designs for approval before construction
site_selection_construction.site_visits: 3 construction visits (new build), up to 3 (conversion), 2 IT certification visits
site_selection_construction.opening_authorization: May not open without franchisor's written authorization including pre-opening inspection
site_selection_construction.pre_opening_defaults: $5,000/day liquidated damages for opening before authorized

training_obligations.new_owner_orientation: At least 1 equity owner, within 6 months (new build) or 3 months (conversion)
training_obligations.gm_certification: Required before Opening Date (new) or within 60 days (transfer/conversion/new hire)
training_obligations.service_culture: 1-hour online course for all associates within 90 days of hire

operational_obligations.standards_compliance: Must comply with all Standards; franchisor may unilaterally change Standards
operational_obligations.reservation_service: Must use and give first priority to all confirmed reservations
operational_obligations.loyalty_programs: Must participate in and honor all required programs
operational_obligations.no_competing_business: May not affiliate hotel with another brand, promote competing business, or enter concessionaire agreements without consent
operational_obligations.no_gambling_adult: No gambling, adult entertainment, timeshares, vacation ownership
operational_obligations.staffing: Must employ full-time qualified GM (GM Certification required). Must use approved Management Company or manage directly.
operational_obligations.data_ownership: Franchisor owns all Data and Guest Data
operational_obligations.database_access: No contractual limits on franchisor's independent access to franchisee databases

technology_obligations.required_systems: PMS, RMS, CRS, credit card terminals/processing — all from sole approved suppliers
technology_obligations.upgrade_obligation: Must comply with then-current standards; no limit on frequency or cost of upgrades
technology_obligations.project_management: Must use franchisor as project manager for PMS/reservation installation
technology_obligations.it_infrastructure_certification: Must use franchisor for IT infrastructure review and certification

non_curable: Fail to identify as Brand Hotel / violate IP rights
Breach insurance, indemnification, data privacy, guest safety provisions

transfer_restrictions.transferee_new_agreement: Must sign then-current FA — may have materially different terms
transfer_restrictions.death_disability: Must transfer within required timeframe or franchisor may terminate

guaranty.scope: Personal guaranty required if franchisee is entity. Also required if hotel owned by different entity than franchisee.
guaranty.spousal: Not specified as required in standard form

liquidated_damages.post_opening_gt_5_years: 5 × annual royalty (prior 12 months at full rates)
liquidated_damages.post_opening_lt_5_years: Remaining days × average daily royalty (prior 12 months)
liquidated_damages.full_rate_basis: Calculated using full royalty/SSF rates even if temporary reductions were given
liquidated_damages.condemnation_casualty: Liquidated damages plus portion of insurance proceeds

dispute_resolution.arbitration: All disputes except indemnification, equitable relief, enforcement of awards
dispute_resolution.statute_of_limitations: 1 year from date franchisee knew or should have known of claim (per Section 19.6, if applicable)
dispute_resolution.waiver_of_claims_if_delayed: If franchisee does not raise issue within 1 year, it is deemed waived (Section 20.6)

indemnification.scope: Franchisee must indemnify franchisor for all liabilities, fines, losses, damages, costs, attorneys' fees arising from: data breach, privacy violations, standards non-compliance, franchisee actions, default, claims against franchisee/affiliates, any damages related to Hotel/Site/FA
indemnification.insurance_pass_through: If franchisee fails to maintain insurance, franchisor may obtain at franchisee's cost plus penalty

post_termination.de_identification: Must de-identify hotel (franchisor may inspect until complete)
post_termination.change_listings: Phone, internet, business registrations, webpages, social media
post_termination.return_materials: Return Standards and all materials with Marks or Confidential Info
post_termination.franchisor_entry_right: May enter hotel on <2 days' notice until de-identified

distinctive_clauses.business_judgment_deference: Section 18.3: Where franchisor exercises judgment, neither mediator, judge, nor trier of fact shall substitute their judgment for franchisor's
distinctive_clauses.no_reliance: Section 20.10.2: Franchisee represents it did not rely on promises not contained in FA. Has independently investigated risks.
distinctive_clauses.corrupt_practices: Section 20.8: Anti-bribery and anti-corruption compliance required
distinctive_clauses.sanctioned_persons: Section 20.9: Franchisee warrants no ownership by sanctioned persons; immediate termination right if violated
distinctive_clauses.independent_contractor: Section 18.1: Detailed independent contractor provisions. Franchisee solely responsible for all labor/employment matters.
distinctive_clauses.social_media_ownership: Section 8.3.2: Franchisee may not use/register any social media sites with Marks. Must assign all such sites to franchisor on request. Immediate injunctive relief for violations.
